label: About
title: About Unheard Index Cloth
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 70 recent saved-signal files and 78 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Every Noise at Once and Anchor image material 1, plus 7 more. A source image from everynoise.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Unheard Index Cloth: Overhead scan of a textile field: a large bone-white poster-cloth surface, mostly empty, with source evidence held at the edges as hairline repairs, pinholes, glints, and tiny cut apertures. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against lower-left torn glossy book sliver, wide diagonal stitched repair seam, and upper-right pinhole taxonomy constellation.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
